title: Sales Manager Vacancy at Brookfield India REIT - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Sales Manager Vacancy at Brookfield India REIT - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Sales Manager looking for your next big career move? Brookfield India REIT in Chennai offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Brookfield India REIT:
Brookfield India REIT is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in Title Search

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Referral bonus program
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Chennai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Brookfield India REIT!
